title: brassica rupestris subsp. hispida
intro: Brassica rupestris subsp. hispida, also known as hispid rock cabbage, is a subspecies of wild cabbage belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is valued for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of various conditions.
